description_long: This is a plush stuffed toy modeled after the iconic character Mickey Mouse, featuring a large round black head with prominent circular ears and a white face. The toy has expressive oval eyes, a small black nose, and a simple, friendly mouth. Its body is dressed in bright red shorts with two white buttons, yellow shoes, and white gloves, all of which are signature elements of Mickey Mouse's classic appearance. The arms are outstretched horizontally, and the legs are straight, giving the toy a welcoming and playful stance. The surface appears soft and slightly matte, typical of fabric plush toys, with visible seams and gentle contours. The overall design is highly recognizable and intended to evoke a sense of nostalgia and friendliness.
description: A soft, plush Mickey Mouse stuffed toy with outstretched arms, red shorts, yellow shoes, and white gloves. The toy features a friendly face and classic cartoon styling.
description_view_0: Front view showing Mickey Mouse's face, red shorts, yellow shoes, and outstretched arms.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, nose, and the extended arm and leg.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, ears, body, and the tail, with both arms and legs visible from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, nose, and the extended arm and leg.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is cheerful and friendly, with wide open eyes and a small, subtle smile. The features convey a welcoming and playful demeanor.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright with both arms extended horizontally to the sides and legs straight. The head is facing forward.
